zh.lifeSummary: 當Hywel ab Ieuan "Fychan"於1437年出生在威爾士福林爾時，他的父親Ieuan "Fychan" ab Ieuan ab Adda ab Iorwerth  "Ddû"37歲，母親Angharad Verch Howel ap Tudor37歲。他於大約1460年與Margred ferch Gruffydd結婚。他去世於1477年之後在英國威爾斯福林爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hywel ab Ieuan "Fychan"于1437年出生在威尔士福林爾时，他的父亲Ieuan "Fychan" ab Ieuan ab Adda ab Iorwerth  "Ddû"37岁，母亲Angharad Verch Howel ap Tudor37岁。他于大约1460年与Margred ferch Gruffydd结婚。他去世于1477年之后在英国威尔斯福林爾。

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Hywell
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Howell
meanings: Anglicized form of the Welsh name Hywel , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that name.

nameMeanings.name: ab
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

nameMeanings.name: Ieuan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: "Fychan"
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

en.lifeSummary: When Hywel ab Ieuan "Fychan" was born in 1437, in Flintshire, Wales, his father, Ieuan "Fychan" ab Ieuan ab Adda ab Iorwerth  "Ddû", was 37 and his mother, Angharad Verch Howel ap Tudor, was 37. He married Margred ferch Gruffydd about 1460. He died after 1477, in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.Mostyn, Flint, Wales: Mostyn, Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hywel ab Ieuan "Fychan" est né en 1437, à Flintshire, Galles, son père, Ieuan "Fychan" ab Ieuan ab Adda ab Iorwerth  "Ddû", avait 37 ans et sa mère, Angharad Verch Howel ap Tudor, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Margred ferch Gruffydd environ 1460. Il est décédé après 1477, à Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hywel ab Ieuan "Fychan" 1437 in Flintshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ieuan "Fychan" ab Ieuan ab Adda ab Iorwerth  "Ddû" 37 und seine Mutter Angharad Verch Howel ap Tudor 37. Er hat um 1460 Margred ferch Gruffydd geheiratet. Er starb nach 1477 in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hywel ab Ieuan "Fychan" è nato il nel 1437 nel Flintshire, Galles, il suo padre, Ieuan "Fychan" ab Ieuan ab Adda ab Iorwerth  "Ddû", aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Angharad Verch Howel ap Tudor, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Margred ferch Gruffydd circa 1460. Morì dopo il 1477, nel Flintshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Hywel ab Ieuan "Fychan"が1437年にウェールズフリントシュアイアで生まれた時，父Ieuan "Fychan" ab Ieuan ab Adda ab Iorwerth  "Ddû"は37歳，母Angharad Verch Howel ap Tudorは37歳であった。約1460年にMargred ferch Gruffyddと結婚した。彼は1477年以後にイギリスウェールズフリントシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hywel ab Ieuan "Fychan"(이)가 1437년 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ieuan "Fychan" ab Ieuan ab Adda ab Iorwerth  "Ddû"(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Angharad Verch Howel ap Tudor(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 1460년 Margred ferch Gruffydd(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1477년 이후 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hywel ab Ieuan "Fychan" nasceu em 1437, em Flintshire, Gales, seu pai, Ieuan "Fychan" ab Ieuan ab Adda ab Iorwerth  "Ddû", tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Angharad Verch Howel ap Tudor, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Margred ferch Gruffydd aproximadamente 1460. Ele faleceu após 1477, em Flintshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hywel ab Ieuan "Fychan" родился в 1437 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Ieuan "Fychan" ab Ieuan ab Adda ab Iorwerth  "Ddû" было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Angharad Verch Howel ap Tudor, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Margred ferch Gruffydd около 1460 г. Он умер после 1477 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hywel ab Ieuan "Fychan" nació en 1437, en Flintshire, Gales, su papá, Ieuan "Fychan" ab Ieuan ab Adda ab Iorwerth  "Ddû", tenía 37 años y su mamá, Angharad Verch Howel ap Tudor, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Margred ferch Gruffydd aproximadamente 1460. Murió después de 1477, en Flintshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
